title: Schott Zwiesel Pure Glassware - White Wine Glasses - Set of 2, 408ml Capacity, Tritan Glass, Dishwasher Safe.
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: The Schott Zwiesel Pure White Wine Glasses boast a sleek and modern design that will elevate your wine drinking experience.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made of Tritan glass, these glasses are highly durable and resistant to breakage, ensuring long-lasting use.
OPTIMAL SIZE: With a capacity of 408ml, these glasses are the perfect size for enjoying a generous pour of your favorite white wine.
ENHANCED TASTING EXPERIENCE: The shape of these glasses has been designed to enhance the aroma and flavor of your wine, providing a superior tasting experience.
DISHWASHER SAFE: These glasses are dishwasher safe for easy and convenient cleaning after use.
description: Bring a touch of elegance to your table with this set of two White Wine Glasses from the Schott Zwiesel Pure range. With their contemporary angular style, these wine glasses are designed to let wine breath so you can enjoy the release of flavours and enhanced aromas. These glasses have a smaller bowl than the red wine glasses from the range, with tall sides to dispense the wine to the back and sides of the tongue, perfect for serving Sauvignon Blancs and other white wines to provide depth to even the most delicate of bouquets. Glasses with a smaller bowl also help the wine to retain a cooler temperature. The white wine glasses are also manufactured from TRITANPROTECT crystal glass, which achieves perfect form and radiant gleam for all Schott Zwiesel Pure glassware. The treatment protects glasses against wear in the dishwasher and helps to prevent damage if they topple over. The stem surface is also specially tempered to enhance overall durability and breaking resistance, meaning these wine glasses have twice the break strength at the stem compared to regular glassware.
